name: Feynman Mode progress chart renders inside a styled panel with score label
description: After restyling the Feynman progress sparkline, the chart should render inside a bordered inset panel with a 'PROGRESS' header and a clearly visible latest score number on the right side. This test confirms the restyle is live and rendering correctly.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Select any available topic from the topic selector dropdown
Verify a progress section is visible below the topic selector — it should show a 'PROGRESS' label and a numeric score value on the right side, all inside a bordered panel
